_comment: Restaurant data for NomadCompass city pages. Top-rated restaurants with 50+ reviews.

lisbon.name: Cervejaria Ramiro
lisbon.description: Legendary seafood institution featured on Anthony Bourdain's No Reservations. Famous for fresh prawns, clams, and shellfish.

lisbon.name: Time Out Market
lisbon.description: Lisbon's famous food market with dozens of stalls from top local chefs. Perfect for sampling Portuguese cuisine.

lisbon.name: Taberna da Rua das Flores
lisbon.description: Authentic tasca experience with local seasonal ingredients. One of Lisbon's best for traditional Portuguese dining.

bangkok.name: Gaggan Anand
bangkok.description: Named #3 in Asia's 50 Best Restaurants 2024. Legendary chef Gaggan Anand's 'food opera' experience with innovative Indian cuisine.

bangkok.name: Sorn
bangkok.description: Michelin-starred Southern Thai cuisine. Famous for its regional dishes and notoriously hard to book. #11 in Asia's 50 Best.

bangkok.name: Jay Fai
bangkok.description: The world's only Michelin-starred street food vendor. Famous for crab omelette cooked by the legendary Jay Fai herself.

bali.name: Locavore NXT
bali.description: Bali's top fine dining experience. 20+ course journey using local ingredients from their rooftop farm and fermentation lab.

bali.name: Merah Putih
bali.description: One of Bali's most mesmerizing venues. Traditional Indonesian flavors with modern twist using local produce from across the archipelago.

bali.name: Hujan Locale
bali.description: Created by renowned chef Will Meyrick. Southeast Asian street food-style dishes with an upscale twist in stylish Ubud setting.

chiangmai.name: Khao Soi Khun Yai
chiangmai.description: Serves what could be the best khao soi in Chiang Mai. Famous coconut curry noodle soup in an authentic open-air setting.

chiangmai.name: Tong Tem Toh
chiangmai.description: One of the best for Northern Thai cuisine near Nimman. Must-try kaeng hang le curry, larb kua, and nam prik chili dips.

chiangmai.name: Huen Phen
chiangmai.description: Long-time favorite serving Northern Thai fare for over 40 years. Known for excellent khao soi in charming Old City setting.

mexicocity.name: Pujol
mexicocity.description: Chef Enrique Olvera's legendary mole madre. One of the world's best restaurants.

mexicocity.name: El Huequito
mexicocity.description: Birthplace of tacos al pastor. Standing room only, incredible since 1959.

mexicocity.name: Contramar
mexicocity.description: The red and green tuna tostadas are iconic. Long waits but worth it.

barcelona.name: Tickets
barcelona.description: Ferran Adrià's playful tapas bar. Creative, fun, and utterly delicious.

barcelona.name: Bar Mut
barcelona.description: Neighborhood gem with excellent vermouth and classic tapas. Local favorite.

barcelona.name: Disfrutar
barcelona.description: Three Michelin stars and #2 World's Best Restaurant 2023. Life-changing meal.

berlin.name: Mustafa's Gemüse Kebap
berlin.description: The famous döner with the legendary queue. Worth the wait for the best kebab in Berlin.

berlin.name: Katz Orange
berlin.description: Candlelit courtyard dining with slow-cooked meats and craft cocktails. Romantic.

berlin.name: Tim Raue
berlin.description: Two Michelin stars and Asia-inspired creativity from Berlin's celebrity chef.

tokyo.name: Tsuta
tokyo.description: First ramen shop to earn a Michelin star. Truffle shoyu ramen is transcendent.

tokyo.name: Sukiyabashi Jiro
tokyo.description: The legendary sushi temple from Jiro Dreams of Sushi. Reservation nearly impossible.

tokyo.name: Ichiran
tokyo.description: Solo booth ramen experience with customizable noodles. Open 24 hours.

medellin.name: El Cielo
medellin.description: Chef Juanma's molecular cuisine masterpiece. Michelin-starred in DC and Miami, equally acclaimed here. 22-course sensory experience.

medellin.name: Carmen
medellin.description: Once #1 on TripAdvisor for years. Visited by celebrities like Tom Cruise. Consistently excellent dining experience since 2008.

medellin.name: Mondongos
medellin.description: Most famous traditional Colombian restaurant. Frequented by locals, presidents, tourists. Famous for hearty sopa de mondongo.

tbilisi.name: Cafe Littera
tbilisi.description: Stunning garden restaurant in Writers' House serving refined Georgian cuisine. A must-visit.

tbilisi.name: Shavi Lomi
tbilisi.description: Atmospheric cellar restaurant with live music and authentic khinkali. Locals' favorite.

tbilisi.name: Barbarestan
tbilisi.description: Recipes from a 19th-century cookbook, beautifully executed. Unique dining experience.

budapest.name: Mazel Tov
budapest.description: Trendy ruin bar meets restaurant with incredible hummus and grilled meats in a stunning courtyard setting.

budapest.name: Bors GasztroBar
budapest.description: Legendary tiny spot serving creative soups and baguettes. Cash only, worth every forint.

budapest.name: Onyx Restaurant
budapest.description: Two Michelin-starred temple of modern Hungarian cuisine in an elegant historic setting.

capetown.name: The Test Kitchen
capetown.description: Luke Dale-Roberts' legendary tasting menu restaurant. Book months in advance.

capetown.name: Kloof Street House
capetown.description: Beautiful Victorian house with creative cocktails and eclectic menu. Great atmosphere.

capetown.name: Mzansi Restaurant
capetown.description: Authentic township cuisine celebrating South African flavors. Cultural dining experience.

buenosaires.name: Don Julio
buenosaires.description: World's best steakhouse according to many rankings. Legendary beef and wine selection.

buenosaires.name: El Preferido de Palermo
buenosaires.description: Charming neighborhood bodegón with excellent milanesas and nostalgic atmosphere.

buenosaires.name: Proper
buenosaires.description: Contemporary small plates and natural wines in hip Palermo setting.

tallinn.name: Rataskaevu 16
tallinn.description: Cozy Old Town cellar with excellent Estonian comfort food. Try the elk soup.

tallinn.name: Noa Chef's Hall
tallinn.description: Stunning seaside location with innovative Nordic cuisine and city views.

tallinn.name: Leib Resto ja Aed
tallinn.description: Garden restaurant in Old Town focusing on local, seasonal ingredients.

prague.name: Lokál Dlouhááá
prague.description: Tank beer and traditional Czech classics done perfectly. No tourist trap here.

prague.name: Field Restaurant
prague.description: Michelin-starred farm-to-table dining with creative Czech-inspired cuisine.

prague.name: Cafe Savoy
prague.description: Gorgeous neo-Renaissance cafe with the best breakfast in Prague. Don't skip pastries.

vienna.name: Figlmüller
vienna.description: The schnitzel that's bigger than the plate. Vienna institution since 1905.

vienna.name: Steirereck
vienna.description: Two Michelin stars in a stunning park setting. Austria's best restaurant.

vienna.name: Cafe Central
vienna.description: Historic coffee house where Trotsky played chess. Essential Vienna experience.

amsterdam.name: Rijsel
amsterdam.description: Incredible stoofvlees (beef stew) and Belgian classics. Book ahead, always packed.

amsterdam.name: De Kas
amsterdam.description: Restaurant in a greenhouse serving what they grow. Unique Amsterdam experience.

amsterdam.name: Foodhallen
amsterdam.description: Indoor food market with diverse vendors. Great for groups and sampling.

seoul.name: Mingles
seoul.description: Two Michelin stars redefining Korean cuisine. Stunning presentations.

seoul.name: Gwangjang Market
seoul.description: Historic market with incredible bindaetteok and mayak kimbap. Anthony Bourdain approved.

seoul.name: Maple Tree House
seoul.description: Premium KBBQ with high-quality meat and traditional banchan.

singapore.name: Hawker Chan
singapore.description: World's cheapest Michelin-starred meal. Soya sauce chicken worth the queue.

singapore.name: Burnt Ends
singapore.description: Australian BBQ meets fine dining. Counter seating around the custom grills.

singapore.name: Lau Pa Sat
singapore.description: Historic food court with satay street at night. Singapore food culture in one place.

sydney.name: Quay
sydney.description: Three-hatted restaurant with stunning Opera House views. Special occasion worthy.

sydney.name: Mr. Wong
sydney.description: Massive dim sum hall in a heritage building. The duck is legendary.

sydney.name: Bourke Street Bakery
sydney.description: Iconic Sydney bakery with the best sausage rolls and ginger brûlée tarts.

melbourne.name: Attica
melbourne.description: Native Australian ingredients elevated to art. One of the world's best.

melbourne.name: Chin Chin
melbourne.description: No reservations, always packed. Worth the queue for bold Asian flavors.

melbourne.name: Lune Croissanterie
melbourne.description: Possibly the world's best croissants. The twice-baked is life-changing.

denver.name: Fruition
denver.description: James Beard-nominated restaurant with Colorado-sourced ingredients.

denver.name: El Taco de Mexico
denver.description: Cash-only hole-in-the-wall with authentic tacos. Locals' secret.

denver.name: Guard and Grace
denver.description: Upscale steakhouse with downtown views and prime cuts.

austin.name: Franklin Barbecue
austin.description: The most famous BBQ in America. 3+ hour waits, absolutely worth it.

austin.name: Uchi
austin.description: James Beard Award-winning sushi with Texas twists. Omakase is exceptional.

austin.name: Torchy's Tacos
austin.description: Austin original with creative taco combinations. The Trailer Park is famous.

split.name: Villa Spiza
split.description: Tiny gem in Diocletian's Palace serving daily-changing Croatian comfort food. No menu - just whatever's fresh that day.

split.name: Konoba Marjan
split.description: Family-run spot near Marjan Hill with stunning Adriatic seafood. Try the black risotto and grilled fish.

split.name: Uje Oil Bar
split.description: Olive oil-focused restaurant showcasing Croatian oils and local ingredients. Creative Mediterranean dishes in historic setting.

playadelcarmen.name: Alux Restaurant
playadelcarmen.description: Extraordinary dining inside a natural cenote cave. Upscale Mexican cuisine in one of the most unique settings on Earth.

playadelcarmen.name: El Fogon
playadelcarmen.description: Authentic Yucatecan tacos and local favorites. The al pastor and cochinita pibil are legendary among locals.

playadelcarmen.name: La Cueva del Chango
playadelcarmen.description: Jungle-like garden setting perfect for brunch. Organic Mexican dishes with fresh juices and excellent coffee.

kualalumpur.name: Jalan Alor
kualalumpur.description: KL's most famous food street with dozens of hawker stalls. Must-try char kway teow, satay, and grilled wings.

kualalumpur.name: Dewakan
kualalumpur.description: Malaysia's first restaurant on Asia's 50 Best list. Chef Darren Teoh showcases indigenous Malaysian ingredients.

kualalumpur.name: Village Park Restaurant
kualalumpur.description: Famous for arguably KL's best nasi lemak. The crispy fried chicken with sambal is worth the queue.

hochiminhcity.name: The Lunch Lady
hochiminhcity.description: Featured on Anthony Bourdain's show. A different noodle soup each day of the week, cooked by the legendary Nguyen Thi Thanh.

hochiminhcity.name: Anan Saigon
hochiminhcity.description: Chef Peter Cuong Franklin's celebration of Vietnamese street food, elevated. Try the famous pho French dip.

hochiminhcity.name: Banh Mi Huynh Hoa
hochiminhcity.description: The most famous banh mi in Saigon. Overflowing with pate, cold cuts, and pickled vegetables. Always a queue.

porto.name: Cantinho do Avillez
porto.description: Celebrity chef Jose Avillez's Porto outpost. Creative Portuguese tapas in a charming riverside setting.

porto.name: Cafe Santiago
porto.description: Home of Porto's most famous francesinha - the legendary meat sandwich drowned in cheese and spicy sauce.

porto.name: Flor dos Congregados
porto.description: Old-school tasca with traditional Porto dishes. Excellent caldo verde, tripas, and other northern specialties.

belgrade.name: Question Mark (Znak Pitanja)
belgrade.description: Belgrade's oldest tavern from 1823. Traditional Serbian cuisine with rakija in a historic setting near the cathedral.

belgrade.name: Dva Jelena
belgrade.description: Iconic restaurant in bohemian Skadarlija street. Live traditional music and hearty Serbian dishes since 1832.

belgrade.name: Ambar
belgrade.description: Modern take on Balkan cuisine with unlimited small plates concept. Great river views and excellent rakija selection.

laspalmas.name: El Herrero
laspalmas.description: Legendary local tapas bar in Vegueta. Old-school atmosphere with excellent ham, cheese, and classic Spanish dishes.

laspalmas.name: Deliciosa Marta
laspalmas.description: Creative Canarian cuisine in a beautiful courtyard. Fresh seafood and innovative takes on traditional island dishes.

laspalmas.name: La Barra de Juan
laspalmas.description: Fresh catch prepared simply. Popular with locals for fried fish, papas arrugadas, and ocean-to-table quality.

oaxaca.name: Los Danzantes
oaxaca.description: Upscale Oaxacan cuisine in a stunning courtyard. Famous for mole negro and extensive mezcal selection.

oaxaca.name: Mercado 20 de Noviembre
oaxaca.description: Legendary food market with smoky grilled meats. Pick your meat at the butchers and have it grilled at the pasillo de carnes.

oaxaca.name: Casa Oaxaca
oaxaca.description: Chef Alejandro Ruiz's celebration of Oaxacan ingredients. Seven different moles and traditional dishes with modern presentation.

penang.name: Tek Sen
penang.description: Legendary zi char restaurant. Famous for double-roasted pork and claypot dishes. Always packed with locals.

penang.name: Penang Road Famous Teochew Chendul
penang.description: The most famous cendol in Malaysia. Shaved ice with coconut milk, palm sugar, and green rice flour jelly since 1936.

penang.name: Siam Road Char Koay Teow
penang.description: Possibly the best char kway teow in the world. Worth the queue for the wok hei smoky noodles.

montevideo.name: Mercado del Puerto
montevideo.description: Historic market hall with incredible parrilla (grill) restaurants. The ultimate Uruguayan meat experience.

montevideo.name: La Pulperia
montevideo.description: Traditional Uruguayan dishes in charming rustic setting. Excellent empanadas, asado, and local wines.

montevideo.name: Cafe Bacacay
montevideo.description: Beloved corner cafe in Ciudad Vieja. Classic Uruguayan coffee culture with excellent medialunas and people watching.

dubai.name: Al Ustad Special Kabab
dubai.description: Hidden gem in Bur Dubai serving Iranian kebabs since 1978. Featured on Anthony Bourdain's show. Cash only.

dubai.name: Tresind Studio
dubai.description: Two Michelin stars and ranked #3 in MENA's 50 Best. Chef Himanshu Saini's theatrical modern Indian tasting menu.

dubai.name: Ravi Restaurant
dubai.description: Dubai institution since 1978. Legendary Pakistani and North Indian dishes at unbeatable prices. Open 24 hours.

miami.name: Joe's Stone Crab
miami.description: Miami Beach institution since 1913. The original stone crab destination with legendary key lime pie.

miami.name: Versailles
miami.description: The most famous Cuban restaurant in America. Essential for ropa vieja, Cuban sandwich, and cafe con leche.

miami.name: KYU
miami.description: Wynwood's hottest spot for wood-fired Asian cuisine. The coconut miso-glazed short rib is legendary.

vancouver.name: Vij's
vancouver.description: Canada's most famous Indian restaurant. No reservations, but worth the wait for innovative Indian cuisine.

vancouver.name: Miku
vancouver.description: Aburi sushi pioneer with stunning waterfront views. Their flame-seared sushi is unlike anything else.

vancouver.name: Phnom Penh
vancouver.description: Chinatown institution famous for butter beef and chicken wings. Cash only, always packed, always delicious.

auckland.name: Depot Eatery
auckland.description: Chef Al Brown's bustling shared plates restaurant. Fresh oysters, sliders, and NZ comfort food.

auckland.name: Cassia
auckland.description: Sid Sahrawat's award-winning modern Indian cuisine. New Zealand ingredients with Indian techniques.

auckland.name: Federal Delicatessen
auckland.description: New York-style deli in Auckland. Outstanding pastrami sandwiches, bagels, and comfort food classics.

hanoi.name: Pho Gia Truyen
hanoi.description: Legendary pho spot on Bat Dan street since 1950s. Simple perfection - just beef pho, nothing else needed.

hanoi.name: Bun Cha Huong Lien (Obama Bun Cha)
hanoi.description: Where Obama and Bourdain had their famous meal. The Obama Combo is still on the menu.

hanoi.name: Cha Ca La Vong
hanoi.description: The original cha ca restaurant since 1871. Turmeric-marinated fish cooked tableside, a Hanoi institution.

danang.name: Ba Duong
danang.description: Famous for Mi Quang - Da Nang's signature turmeric noodle dish. Locals' favorite since decades.

danang.name: Banh Xeo Ba Duong
danang.description: The best banh xeo (crispy pancakes) in Da Nang. Huge portions filled with shrimp, pork, and bean sprouts.

danang.name: Madame Lan
danang.description: Elegant Vietnamese restaurant with beautifully presented Central Vietnamese dishes. Great for a special dinner.

taipei.name: Din Tai Fung (Original)
taipei.description: The original xiao long bao restaurant, now a global empire. Still the benchmark for soup dumplings.

taipei.name: RAW
taipei.description: Chef Andre Chiang's two Michelin star restaurant. Innovative Taiwanese cuisine that's nearly impossible to book.

taipei.name: Shilin Night Market
taipei.description: Taipei's largest and most famous night market. Essential for stinky tofu, oyster omelette, and bubble tea.

manila.name: Toyo Eatery
manila.description: Asia's 50 Best listed restaurant. Chef Jordy Navarra's celebration of Filipino ingredients and traditions.

manila.name: Aristocrat Restaurant
manila.description: Manila institution since 1936. Famous for their barbecue chicken and classic Filipino comfort food.

manila.name: Salcedo Saturday Market
manila.description: Makati's beloved weekend food market. Regional Filipino dishes, fresh produce, and artisan goods.

cebu.name: House of Lechon
cebu.description: Cebu is the lechon capital of the Philippines, and this is among the best. Crispy pork perfection.

cebu.name: Zubuchon
cebu.description: Anthony Bourdain called it 'the best pig ever.' Marketman's legendary lechon with organic pigs.

cebu.name: Lantaw Native Restaurant
cebu.description: Floating restaurant with stunning sunset views. Fresh seafood in a traditional Filipino setting.

siemreap.name: Cuisine Wat Damnak
siemreap.description: Cambodia's most acclaimed restaurant. Chef Joannès Rivière's set menus showcase forgotten Khmer ingredients.

siemreap.name: Genevieve's
siemreap.description: Home-style Khmer cooking in intimate setting. Excellent amok and other traditional dishes.

siemreap.name: Pou Kitchen
siemreap.description: Social enterprise restaurant serving refined street food. Supports local community while serving delicious food.

phnompenh.name: Romdeng
phnompenh.description: NGO restaurant training at-risk youth. Adventurous menu including tarantulas, plus excellent traditional dishes.

phnompenh.name: Friends the Restaurant
phnompenh.description: Another NGO gem training street youth. Khmer tapas in beautiful colonial building. Must-try spring rolls.

phnompenh.name: Sovanna II
phnompenh.description: Legendary riverside BBQ spot. Grill your own meats and seafood Cambodian-style with delicious dipping sauces.

kathmandu.name: Krishnarpan
kathmandu.description: Nepal's finest dining experience at Dwarika's Hotel. Up to 22-course Nepali feast in royal setting.

kathmandu.name: Bhojan Griha
kathmandu.description: Cultural dining with traditional music and dance. Authentic Newari and Nepali dishes in heritage building.

kathmandu.name: Thamel House Restaurant
kathmandu.description: Traditional Newari house serving set meals. Excellent dal bhat and momos in the heart of Thamel.

pokhara.name: Moondance Restaurant
pokhara.description: Lakeside institution with stunning Annapurna views. Great steaks, pasta, and Nepali dishes.

pokhara.name: Caffe Concerto
pokhara.description: Best pizza in Pokhara with Italian owner. Perfect post-trek comfort food with mountain views.

pokhara.name: Godfather's Pizzeria
pokhara.description: Backpacker favorite with generous portions. Great pizzas and pasta at budget-friendly prices.

mumbai.name: Trishna
mumbai.description: Mumbai's legendary crab restaurant. The butter pepper garlic crab is mandatory. Book ahead.

mumbai.name: Leopold Cafe
mumbai.description: Historic Colaba cafe since 1871. Tourist institution but still serving solid Indian and Continental fare.

mumbai.name: Swati Snacks
mumbai.description: Elevated Gujarati street food in clean surroundings. Famous for panki, sev puri, and handvo.

bangalore.name: MTR (Mavalli Tiffin Rooms)
bangalore.description: Bangalore institution since 1924. Legendary for dosa, idli, and filter coffee. Worth the queue.

bangalore.name: Karavalli
bangalore.description: Award-winning coastal cuisine from Karnataka, Kerala, and Goa. Beautiful setting at Taj Gateway.

bangalore.name: Vidyarthi Bhavan
bangalore.description: Heritage dosa joint since 1943. The crispy masala dosa and filter coffee are legendary.

goa.name: Gunpowder
goa.description: Hidden gem in Assagao serving Kerala and South Indian dishes. Beautiful garden setting, book ahead.

goa.name: Vinayak Family Restaurant
goa.description: No-frills local favorite in Baga for authentic Goan seafood. Try the fish thali and prawn curry.

goa.name: Antares
goa.description: Celebrity chef Sarah Todd's Vagator beach restaurant. Great cocktails and sunset views.

colombo.name: Ministry of Crab
colombo.description: Cricketer-owned crab restaurant in historic Dutch Hospital. Sri Lankan mud crab at its finest.

colombo.name: Nuga Gama
colombo.description: Traditional Sri Lankan village experience at Cinnamon Grand. Authentic rice and curry spread.

colombo.name: Upali's
colombo.description: Popular for authentic Sri Lankan rice and curry. Great value with generous portions.

telaviv.name: HaKosem
telaviv.description: The king of falafel in Tel Aviv. Legendary crispy falafel and sabich. Always a queue, always worth it.

telaviv.name: Miznon
telaviv.description: Chef Eyal Shani's pita empire. Whole roasted cauliflower and creative pita sandwiches.

telaviv.name: OCD
telaviv.description: Raz Rahav's tasting menu in intimate setting. Creative, boundary-pushing Israeli cuisine.

cairo.name: Abou El Sid
cairo.description: Upscale Egyptian cuisine in beautiful traditional setting. Excellent koshary, molokhia, and grilled meats.

cairo.name: Koshary Abou Tarek
cairo.description: Cairo's most famous koshary joint. Four floors of carb-loaded Egyptian comfort food.

cairo.name: Zooba
cairo.description: Hip spot modernizing Egyptian street food. Great foul, taameya, and creative drinks.

marrakech.name: Jemaa el-Fnaa Food Stalls
marrakech.description: The famous night market with dozens of food stalls. Essential experience for tagine, couscous, and snails.

marrakech.name: Nomad
marrakech.description: Rooftop restaurant with medina views. Modern take on Moroccan classics with great cocktails.

marrakech.name: Al Fassia
marrakech.description: All-female run restaurant serving exceptional traditional cuisine. Famous lamb tagine and pastilla.

casablanca.name: La Sqala
casablanca.description: Beautiful garden restaurant in a restored 18th century fortress. Traditional Moroccan breakfast and lunch.

casablanca.name: Rick's Cafe
casablanca.description: Recreated from the Casablanca film. Atmospheric spot for cocktails and international cuisine.

casablanca.name: Le Petit Rocher
casablanca.description: Ocean-view seafood restaurant along the Corniche. Fresh catch with French-Moroccan preparations.

accra.name: Buka Restaurant
accra.description: Authentic Ghanaian cuisine in stylish setting. Famous for jollof rice, banku with tilapia, and fufu.

accra.name: The Republic Bar & Grill
accra.description: Hip rooftop spot in Osu. Creative cocktails and fusion dishes with live music on weekends.

accra.name: Azmera
accra.description: Best Ethiopian in Accra. Traditional injera platters with various wots in cozy atmosphere.

nairobi.name: Carnivore Restaurant
nairobi.description: Famous all-you-can-eat meat restaurant. Game meats carved tableside - a Nairobi institution.

nairobi.name: Mama Oliech
nairobi.description: Legendary local spot for fried tilapia and ugali. Politicians and locals queue up alike.

nairobi.name: Talisman
nairobi.description: Karen's beloved garden restaurant. Creative menu mixing African, Asian, and European influences.

kigali.name: Heaven Restaurant
kigali.description: Hillside restaurant with stunning views. Proceeds support local NGO. Creative international menu.

kigali.name: Brachetto
kigali.description: Best Italian in Kigali with wood-fired pizzas. Lovely garden terrace setting.

kigali.name: Repub Lounge
kigali.description: Trendy spot serving modern Rwandan dishes. Great cocktails and vibrant atmosphere.

lagos.name: Terra Kulture
lagos.description: Art gallery meets restaurant. Excellent jollof rice, suya, and traditional Nigerian dishes.

lagos.name: NOK by Alara
lagos.description: Upscale Pan-African cuisine in chic Victoria Island setting. Creative takes on continent's best dishes.

lagos.name: Yellow Chilli
lagos.description: Celebrity chef Sisi Jemimah's restaurant. Refined Nigerian classics in stylish surroundings.

lima.name: Central
lima.description: Ranked #1 in World's 50 Best Restaurants. Chef Virgilio Martinez explores Peru's diverse ecosystems.

lima.name: La Mar
lima.description: Gaston Acurio's legendary ceviche spot. The freshest seafood in Lima's most vibrant setting.

lima.name: Isolina
lima.description: Jose del Castillo's homage to Peruvian tavern cooking. Generous portions of lomo saltado and anticuchos.

cusco.name: Chicha
cusco.description: Gaston Acurio's Cusco outpost. Andean ingredients prepared with modern techniques in colonial setting.

cusco.name: San Pedro Market
cusco.description: Cusco's main market with food stalls. Fresh juices, ceviche, and traditional Andean dishes.

cusco.name: Morena Peruvian Kitchen
cusco.description: Creative Peruvian cooking in cozy plaza-side setting. Great alpaca dishes and pisco cocktails.

bogota.name: El Chato
bogota.description: On Latin America's 50 Best list. Chef Alvaro Clavijo's celebration of Colombian ingredients.

bogota.name: Leo
bogota.description: Leonor Espinosa's award-winning exploration of Colombia's biodiversity. Extraordinary tasting menus.

bogota.name: La Puerta Falsa
bogota.description: Bogota's oldest restaurant since 1816. Traditional tamales and chocolate completo with cheese.

cartagena.name: La Cevicheria
cartagena.description: Anthony Bourdain's favorite spot in Cartagena. Exceptional ceviche in colorful Getsemani setting.

cartagena.name: Carmen
cartagena.description: Elegant restaurant in the old city. Chef's innovative takes on Caribbean Colombian cuisine.

cartagena.name: La Cocina de Pepina
cartagena.description: Home-style Caribbean cooking in Getsemani. Generous portions of arroz con coco and fried fish.

santiago.name: Borago
santiago.description: Chef Rodolfo Guzman's celebration of Chilean terroir. One of Latin America's most acclaimed restaurants.

santiago.name: Liguria
santiago.description: Santiago institution for traditional Chilean food. Multiple locations, always packed with locals.

santiago.name: Mercado Central
santiago.description: Historic fish market with restaurants. Essential for caldillo de congrio and fresh Chilean seafood.

valparaiso.name: Cafe Turri
valparaiso.description: Legendary hilltop restaurant with bay views. Classic Chilean cuisine in beautiful historic building.

valparaiso.name: J Cruz M
valparaiso.description: Historic port-side restaurant since 1940. Sailors, poets, and tourists gather for seafood classics.

valparaiso.name: Apice
valparaiso.description: Young chef's creative tasting menus showcasing Chilean products. Rising star of Valparaiso dining.

quito.name: Zazu
quito.description: Alexander Lau's celebration of Ecuadorian ingredients. On Latin America's 50 Best list.

quito.name: Mercado Central
quito.description: Quito's bustling central market. Authentic ceviche, encebollado, and hornado among the vendors.

quito.name: Theatrum
quito.description: Upscale dining in historic theater building. Elegant Ecuadorian cuisine with city views.

sanjuan.name: La Alcapurria Quema
sanjuan.description: Best alcapurrias in San Juan. Traditional fritters stuffed with meat, always fresh and hot.

sanjuan.name: Marmalade
sanjuan.description: Chef Peter Schintler's elegant Old San Juan restaurant. Innovative Caribbean fusion cuisine.

sanjuan.name: La Casita Blanca
sanjuan.description: Classic criolla cooking in home-like setting. Legendary mofongo and traditional dishes.

santacruz.name: La Casona
santacruz.description: Traditional Bolivian dishes in colonial house setting. Great majadito and silpancho.

santacruz.name: Jardin de Asia
santacruz.description: Popular Asian fusion spot. Good sushi and Thai dishes in pleasant garden setting.
